zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne verch Russell於1104年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch30歲，母親Mrs John Russell25歲。她於1125年與Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1181年在英國英格蘭賀福爾肯丘其享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne verch Russell于1104年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch30岁，母亲Mrs John Russell25岁。她于1125年与Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1181年在英国英格兰賀福爾肯丘其享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne verch Russell was born in 1104, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch, was 30 and her mother, Mrs John Russell, was 25. She married Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont in 1125, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1181, in Kentchurch, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne verch Russell est née en 1104, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Russell, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont en 1125, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1181, à Kentchurch, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne verch Russell 1104 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch 30 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Russell 25. Sie hat 1125 in Glamorgan, Wales Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1181 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kentchurch, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne verch Russell è nata il nel 1104 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mrs John Russell, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont nel 1125, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1181, nel Kentchurch, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne verch Russellが1104年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Russell , of Kentchurchは30歳，母Mrs John Russellは25歳であった。1125年にウェールズグラモーガンでAeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1181年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアケントチャーチで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne verch Russell(이)가 1104년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Russell(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1125년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 켄트c후르치에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne verch Russell nasceu em 1104, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Russell, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont em 1125, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne verch Russell родилась в 1104 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Russell, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont в 1125 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1181 г. в местности кэнчурч, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne verch Russell nació en 1104, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Russell , of Kentchurch, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs John Russell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont en 1125, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1181, en Kentchurch, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
